scripts.build:go: npm run build && node scripts/copy-static.mjs && cd server && go mod download && mkdir -p ../dist-bin && go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../dist-bin/lantalk .
scripts.build:go:win: npm run build && node scripts/copy-static.mjs && cd server && go mod download && mkdir -p ../dist-bin && go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../dist-bin/lantalk.exe .
scripts.build:all: npm run build && node scripts/copy-static.mjs && node scripts/build-all.mjs
